title: duguetia duckei
intro: Duguetia duckei, also known as the Duckei Duguetia, is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest in Brazil. It is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Duguetia duckei include its potential to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparations of Duguetia duckei include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used topically or orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
